description_long: This is a medium-sized kitchen knife with a straight, pointed blade and a dark, textured handle. The blade is metallic and features visible stains or markings resembling dried blood, giving it a dramatic and possibly sinister appearance. The handle is ergonomically shaped with a subtle curve and a diamond-patterned grip, likely made from a synthetic or composite material for comfort and control. The blade is single-edged, tapering to a sharp point, and appears to be made of stainless steel. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, and the transition between the two is smooth. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements aside from the striking stains on the blade.
description: A medium-sized kitchen knife with a stained metallic blade and a dark, textured ergonomic handle. The blade is straight and pointed, with no visible guard or ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the knife, highlighting the stained blade and textured handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view showing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the knife's sharpness.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the stained blade and ergonomic handle, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, showing the slimness of the knife.
attribute_handle_design: curved, textured black plastic with diamond-pattern grip
